evals.prompt: Set up this repo so the Matt Pocock engineering skills know our issue tracker, labels, and domain docs.
evals.expected_output: The agent explores the repo, summarizes what exists, then walks the user through issue tracker, triage labels, and domain docs one decision at a time before editing.
assertions: Checks git remote, existing agent docs, context docs, ADRs, docs/agents, and .scratch before proposing setup.
Explains each setup section in plain language.
Asks for issue tracker, label vocabulary, and domain docs decisions one at a time.
Does not write files before showing a draft and receiving confirmation.

evals.prompt: Configure the skill docs in a repo that already has CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md.
evals.expected_output: The agent updates the existing CLAUDE.md Agent skills block in place and writes docs/agents files from the relevant templates without creating duplicate agent docs.
assertions: Chooses CLAUDE.md when both CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md exist.
Updates an existing Agent skills block in place if present.
Writes issue-tracker, triage-labels, and domain docs under docs/agents.
Uses the matching issue-tracker template for GitHub, GitLab, or local markdown.
